title: DUST MOTES
subtitle: Solenade Garden · early afternoon
epigraph_upright: Generosity of light, the warmth that doesn't ask anything, the long afternoon that's enough.
epigraph_reversed: The light that doesn't relent, the warmth you can't keep being grateful for.
scene_description: The garden is the most generous light in the city. Frank's been sitting under the oak for two hours. The sundial says so.
direction_hint: Stay until the shadow moves three hours. Stay until you're done.
opening_log_lines: You arrive at Solenade Garden · early afternoon.
The pressure starts low. It does not stay low.
Click [b]PHASE: ACTION[/b] anytime for the rules. Try [b]MOVE ↪[/b] to walk.
